healthy_description: Large heart-shaped leaves with distinctive holes (fenestrations). Dark green glossy foliage. Aerial roots visible on stems.

symptom_guide.symptom: Yellowing leaves and soft stem base
symptom_guide.visual_description: Lower leaves turn yellow and become translucent, stems feel mushy at soil line

symptom_guide.symptom: Brown spots with yellow halos on leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: Small dark brown lesions scattered on foliage, may have concentric rings

symptom_guide.symptom: Tiny webs and pale stippling on leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: Fine webbing visible on stems and leaf undersides, leaves appear washed out

symptom_guide.symptom: Slow growth with small pale leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: New leaves emerge much smaller than usual, plant growth significantly slows
